examples: The binding energy of the deuteron can be found experimentally.
To clarify the nuclear effects of deuteron will contribute to a better understanding of parton distributions in bound nucleon.
Deuteron: the nucleus of a deuterium atom consisting of a proton and a neutron regarded as a subatomic particle with unit positive charge.
In an atmosphere of deuterium gas, the field generated positively charged deuteron ions and accelerated them to high energy in a beam.
